description: Destroy tool. Pins the client_id-positive rejection, the confirm-alone destroy gate, and the bypassed DELETE. Longview client api_key is a secret returned by design. Missing-client_id text diverges (Go 'must be a positive integer' vs Python 'is required') so that case is out (see report).

cases.name: rejects non-positive client_id
cases.expect_error: client_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: confirm alone hits the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_longview_client_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
